audit_items.proof_trace: Line 160 applies `using SafeCast for int256` (declared at line 24) so `.toUint256()` dispatches to OZ SafeCast which explicitly reverts with `SafeCastOverflowedIntToUint` when `value < 0`. The widening `int192 → int256` cast is sign-preserving, so any negative `report.price` remains negative and triggers the revert. No unchecked block or bypass path exists in `transmit`.
